Full
Stack Dev

I'm a Junior Software Engineer and Full-Stack Developer based in Sri Lanka, with hands-on experience building real-world applications across the full stack. I work with Java, C#, JavaScript, React, MongoDB and Node.js to create clean, functional software.

Currently expanding my skill set and actively seeking opportunities to grow within a collaborative engineering team. I enjoy turning ideas into working products and solving problems with well-structured code.

  • Junior Full-Stack Developer with Java & JavaScript expertise
  • Experience building desktop apps with C# and SQL
  • Frontend development with React and responsive HTML/CSS
  • Actively building real-world portfolio projects
  • Open to work — ready for internships & junior roles

What I've Built

My Projects

📚

Library Management System

A full-featured desktop application for managing library operations — book inventory, member records, borrowing & returns. Built with C# (Windows Forms) and SQL Server with T-SQL stored procedures.

C#SQL ServerT-SQLWindows Forms

🍽️

Fashion Store Website

Your fashion store frontend is built using a clean, responsive HTML/CSS/JavaScript structure, styled with Bootstrap, and designed to showcase modern UI/UX principles. It focuses on minimalism, product cards, and smooth navigation, making it a strong example of a beginner-to-intermediate frontend project.

HTML5CSS3Bootstrap
🍽️

Restaurant Website

A responsive restaurant website built with HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap. Features a modern layout with menu sections, hero banner, and mobile-friendly navigation — demonstrating frontend fundamentals.

HTML5CSS3Bootstrap
